user.title: Set up TTLock BLE
user.description: Enter your TTLock cloud credentials. They are used once to download the per-lock keys; after that, lock/unlock runs offline over Bluetooth.

verify_code.title: Verify your TTLock account
verify_code.description: TTLock sent a one-time code to your email. Enter it below to register this Home Assistant install as a trusted device.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate TTLock BLE
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid. Enter the updated credentials.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure TTLock BLE
reconfigure.description: Update the credentials for this entry. Keys will be re-synced from the cloud.

error.connection: Unable to reach the TTLock cloud.
error.invalid_code: The verification code was not accepted. Please try again.
error.verification_required: TTLock requires verifying this device. Re-add the integration to complete the flow.

init.title: TTLock BLE options
init.description: Tune polling and other behaviour for this entry.
